message:
chore(engine): sync concurrent agent changes to 7 integration test files

Concurrent agent modifications to integration tests:
- controller_composition_matrix_integration.rs: Updated test scenarios
- e2e_harness.rs: Adjusted harness expectations
- frx_end_to_end_scenario_matrix.rs: Refined matrix assertions
- global_coherence_checker_integration.rs: Simplified test structure
- obstruction_certificate_integration.rs: Refactored test flow
- semantic_transport_ledger_integration.rs: Updated ledger tests
- static_analysis_graph_integration.rs: Expanded graph tests
- structural_causal_model_integration.rs: Streamlined causal tests
